title: centaurea cuneifolia subsp. pallida
intro: Centaurea cuneifolia subsp. pallida is a plant species belonging to the daisy family and is commonly known as the pale knapweed or pale centaury. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Centaurea cuneifolia subsp. pallida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves, flowers, and roots can be used in traditional medicine to extract its medicinal properties.
